J1.basis: This looks like an unfinished rebrand... markets 'Lumina,' an AI meeting assistant — but app/layout.tsx's <title>/meta/OG are still 'InboxZap'... GSC export is 100% legacy 'InboxZap' email-cleanup demand... None of it is on-topic for the current 'Lumina — AI meeting assistant' positioning.
J1.rationale: Explicitly identifies the pivot, correctly separates live product (meeting assistant) from legacy GSC demand (inbox cleanup) and stale repo metadata, and frames the whole plan around that reality. Falls just short of 10 only because the live site never rendered, so the pivot rests on repo+GSC inference (which it honestly labels).

J2.basis: 13 legacy assets classified... post-1: 3900 impr, 2 clicks, avg position 42.3 ... 301-redirect ... into the closest new page — plus the correction: 'don't redirect the homepage... just fix its stale <head> metadata' and 'inboxzap branded queries worth a short bridge page.'
J2.rationale: Walks the inventory asset-by-asset with real GSC impressions/positions and assigns dispositions, and manually overrides the tool's bad homepage-redirect call. Held below high marks because the per-asset dispositions are mechanically uniform (all 13 → redirect, 0 harvest/0 sunset) — a 3,900-impression post gets the same generic 'choose closest new page' treatment as an 80-impression one, with little differentiation.

J3.basis: That's equity worth carrying forward, not losing... 301-redirect the 10 legacy blog posts... into the closest new Lumina content once it exists... build topic clusters for 'AI meeting assistant' (Phase 2)... a short 'Lumina was formerly InboxZap' bridge page so branded search equity isn't simply lost.
J3.rationale: Explicitly names the tension and lands a defensible middle path — preserve/redirect salvageable equity, bridge branded queries, build the meeting-assistant cluster as the growth engine, sequenced across roadmap phases. Avoids both failure modes cleanly.

J1.basis: This looks like an unfinished rebrand... `app/page.tsx` and the nav/footer market **"Lumina," an AI meeting assistant** — but `app/layout.tsx`'s `<title>`/meta/OG are still **"InboxZap..."**... J2.rationale: Genuinely walks the inventory asset-by-asset with real GSC numbers and adds two sharp operator-grade corrections (spare the homepage, bridge the branded queries).
